case_title: ALLYSON BENAS VS. C. COURNALE & CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT C. COURNALE & CO., INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENAS, ALLYSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT C. COURNALE & CO., INC. $1,565.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,640.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DEPT. 506, SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR. 8, 2011, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING, TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE DON MITCHELL. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (NO EXHIBIT RETAINED)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,380.00 FILED BY BENAS, ALLYSON AS TO DEFENDANT C. COURNALE & CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED MAR-11-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT C. COURNALE & CO., INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2011 - JUDGMENT.
